title: Commercial Terms Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger commercial terms foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Commercial Terms Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Commercial Terms Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good commercial terms foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Commercial Terms Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
